title: MC Definitive Edition
description: A new way to play Minecraft.
body:
A modpack focused on improving the vanilla Minecraft experience.

### What this modpack does?
This modpack enhances both small things like the eating animation and big things like world generation and structures, but still preserving the original Minecraft experience.

This modpack also adds volumetric clouds and glowing ores without needing shaders;![Volumetric Clouds without shaders](https://i.imgur.com/Lj2tTkk.jpeg)![Glowing ores without shaders](https://i.imgur.com/eh9nr5y.jpeg) connected textures;![Connected textures](https://i.imgur.com/7pwahuA.png) better first person;![Real first person](https://i.imgur.com/LMe5GV6.png) new armors;![New armors](https://i.imgur.com/faa2MGO.png) new weapons;![New weapons](https://i.imgur.com/7umRInq.png) musical instruments that you can play any song;![Musical instruments](https://i.imgur.com/hwbnOKT.png) and MUCH more.

I took the liberty of putting my 2 favorite shaders in this modpack;

Complementary Reimagined;![Complementary Reimagined](https://i.imgur.com/QG2YHVs.jpeg)
Photon Shader.![Photon Shader 1](https://i.imgur.com/POszQZc.jpeg)![Photon Shader 2](https://i.imgur.com/uBnjYXG.jpeg)

And some texture packs.![Texure packs](https://i.imgur.com/6YTUBGM.png)
### Performance
This modpack has SEVERAL performance mods for you to make the most of the more than 80 VANILLA+ mods in the best possible way and FLUIDITY.

Suggestions are welcome in the discord server.
